title: Monthly subscription valid for how many days
excerpt: I was going through documentation of monetization in apps. Here the info regarding days validity is missing in case of monthly subscription. See the dash in the last line. Can we please get this fixed. Thanks

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was going through documentation of monetization in apps. Here the info regarding days validity is missing in case of monthly subscription. See the dash in the last line. Can we please get this fixed. Thanks

image1708×268 69.8 KB

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @YashGarg,

Thanks for letting us know!

I saw your Slack message and removed that line from the docs. Just waiting to confirm the answer with the team and then I will update it

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
@rachelatmonday @YashGarg monthly subscriptions are valid for the number of days that are in the month that the subscription was purchased in.

  • Jan 2024 = 31 days
  • Feb 2024 = 29 days (it’s a leap year)
  • March 2024 = 31 days

Etc.

I can validate this because I see the webhooks from subscription purchases/renewals.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @dvdsmpsn

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for sharing these insights
